headline: Break the weak streak, nail your deficit today
summary: You're losing 0.52 kg/week but need 0.58—today demands strict food discipline and intentional movement to catch up on your 33-day deficit.
details: Stop emotional eating before it starts: prep your Huel meals for the day now, avoid Friday-style snacking patterns three days early, and keep processed vegan foods out of reach. Hit the rowing machine for 30-40 minutes this morning or treadmill tonight—your sedentary work requires deliberate calorie burn, not hope. Today matters because you're 33 days behind with 408 days left to reach 88 kg; every day of discipline now compounds into momentum, but every day of slacking extends your deadline.
